speaker: Diederich
text: "Celio told you guys about E.P.P.? I’m sure it’s on all your minds, but try to stay focused."

speaker: Diederich
text: Ah, still feelin' like your laggin' behind, huh? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Don’t sweat it. I'll put together a regimen you can do on your own. You got enough time for that? *sigh*

speaker: Theo
text: "Hmph, I knew the country bumpkin would be a burden."
There was nothing I could say back to him. Having lived a carefree life in a fishing village, it’s true my fencing skills are far behind everyone else’s.
How will I become a legitimate knight if this puts me in danger of not even graduating? I have to do something…
